assessment.note: He says specific, in-the-work feedback helps him feel better, which implies that support is currently missing and that clearer feedback improves things.

new_queue.label: Specific feedback
new_queue.name: Specific feedback — where does it usually get too vague or too late?
new_queue.description: Drills into the feedback thread to locate the point where support stops being useful.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Support access
new_queue.name: When you need help, what usually makes it easy or hard to ask for it here?
new_queue.description: Tests whether the team setup makes support feel safe and usable.

new_queue.label: Requirement churn
new_queue.name: What keeps getting reprioritized in a way that changes your design work?
new_queue.description: Surfaces churn from shifting requirements and how it affects his focus.

new_queue.label: Support next step
new_queue.name: What would help most from me right now?
new_queue.description: Opens the support stage by inviting him to name the most useful help.
